# Amirtha Super Store

Amirtha Super Store is a premium online catalog of traditional South Indian handcrafted products. It features high-quality bronze statues, home decor artifacts, puja items, and fine wooden furniture.

## Base URL
- Custom Domain: https://amirthasuperstore.com
- GitHub Pages Path: https://vinothkumar0311.github.io/amirtha_super_store/

## Main Navigation Pages
- Home: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/
- All Products: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products
- About Us: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/about
- Contact: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/contact
- FAQ: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/faq
- Privacy Policy: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/privacy

## Product Categories
- Bronze Statues: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products?category=Bronze%20Statues
- Home Decor Bronze: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products?category=Home%20decor%20bronze
- Puja Items: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products?category=Puja%20Items
- Furniture: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products?category=Furniture

## Product Details Page Format
- Format: https://amirthasuperstore.com/#/products/{id}
- Total available products: 174 items.
